baseline_post_measurements.title: Track A
baseline_post_measurements.counterexample: A reader may infer a general recursive-improvement capability from bounded causal-chain evidence.
baseline_post_measurements.safe_boundary: Bounded causal-chain evidence supports only exact public-safe evidence chains, not general recursive-improvement capability.

baseline_post_measurements.title: Track B
baseline_post_measurements.counterexample: A reader may infer hidden prompt or instruction mutation is allowed.
baseline_post_measurements.safe_boundary: The evidence excludes hidden instruction mutation and records no authority for prompt, instruction, or policy changes.

baseline_post_measurements.title: Track C
baseline_post_measurements.counterexample: A reader may infer AO can change policy or authority boundaries autonomously.
baseline_post_measurements.safe_boundary: The evidence preserves policy-changing autonomy denial and requires separate gates for authority changes.

baseline_post_measurements.title: Track D
baseline_post_measurements.counterexample: A reader may treat bounded causal-chain generality as broad_RSI approval.
baseline_post_measurements.safe_boundary: The evidence keeps broad_RSI denied and approves only counterexample-tested bounded causal-chain wording.

wording_candidate_results.text: AO has public-safe bounded causal-chain generality evidence across four independent governed cycles; stronger recursive-improvement wording and broad_RSI remain denied.
AO has public-safe bounded causal-chain evidence with counterexample-tested claim boundaries; stronger recursive-improvement wording and broad_RSI remain denied.
AO has governed bounded recursive-improvement evidence under explicit denial boundaries; broad_RSI remains denied.
AO has proven broad_RSI for public claim publication across the governed AO stack.

strongest_approved_wording: AO has public-safe bounded causal-chain evidence with counterexample-tested claim boundaries; stronger recursive-improvement wording and broad_RSI remain denied.
exact_blockers: public-reader still denies recursive-improvement wording because the phrase implies general recursive-improvement capability beyond counterexample-tested bounded evidence
adversarial wording flags recursive-improvement phrasing as capability-adjacent overbreadth
Covenant and Architecture approve counterexample-tested bounded causal-chain wording only
Sentinel holds stronger recursive-improvement and broad_RSI public-risk wording
